problem.title: Add Binary
problem.description: Given two binary strings a and b, return their sum as a binary string.
assumptions: Both strings are non-empty and contain only '0' or '1'.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Bit by Bit
solutions.description: Traverse both binary strings from right to left, summing corresponding bits along with a carry value, and prepend each resulting bit to the answer. The carry propagates naturally through the loop, and any leftover carry after both strings are exhausted appends a final '1'. This mirrors the grade-school addition algorithm adapted to base 2.
